title: China Just Built A Two Brain AI Robot: One Body, Two Minds
summary: China released JAKA Pi, a compact humanoid with a split AI brain architecture for real-time cognition and movement. Vietnam introduced Dyno and VR-H3 humanoid robots for homes, security, and industrial work. NVIDIA unveiled Isaac GR00T, a six-foot open-source robot platform with Jetson Thor processors for researcher access.
